violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the honeycomb grates in the retail coolers and the bottom grates of the retail produce cooler were observed with an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

Dumpster/refuse area observed with an accumulation of food(produce)and other debris. Refuse areas shall be keep clean as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023

The floors in back food storage, meat cooler, and dairy cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023
